## 📝 Description

A clear and concise description of the feature.

## 🎯 Motivation

Why would this feature be useful? What problem does it solve?

## 💡 Proposed Solution

How should this feature work? Describe the desired behavior.

## 📚 Example Usage

```python
from graph import Graph

# How would users use this feature?
g = Graph()
# ... your idea here
```

## 🔄 Alternative Solutions

Have you considered other approaches?

## 📌 Related Issues

Are there related issues? Link them here: #123

## 🏷️ Labels

Type:
- [ ] Algorithm
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] API enhancement
- [ ] Visualization
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] I've searched existing issues
- [ ] I've considered alternatives
- [ ] This feature aligns with project goals
